waves.strategy: GATEWAY filings — F3 opens the door for everything else. F6 and F10 are free, file same day.

filings.name: Emergency Motion for Parenting Time
filings.blocker: Depends on F3 success; Andrew must sign affidavit

waves.strategy: File AFTER new judge is assigned from F3. Emergency motion for immediate parenting time restoration.

filings.name: Motion for Relief — Fraud Upon Court
filings.blocker: Andrew must compile specific fraud instances

filings.name: Motion to Modify Custody
filings.blocker: Andrew must sign affidavit of changed circumstances

waves.strategy: MCR 2.612 fraud motion + custody modification. Present to new judge the full pattern.

filings.name: Federal §1983 Complaint
filings.blocker: Federal IFP (AO 239) must be filed; PACER registration

filings.name: COA Leave Application
filings.blocker: Andrew must call COA clerk for 366810 status

waves.strategy: Federal bypass + appellate escalation. Hit from two directions simultaneously.

filings.name: MSC Original Action
filings.blocker: Needs strongest possible record; may wait for COA ruling

filings.name: COA Brief on Merits
filings.blocker: Confirm brief deadline with COA clerk

waves.strategy: MSC superintending control + full COA brief. The nuclear options.
